name: typing-language
description: Foreign language typing practice game with authentic input methods

scripts.lessons:build: bash -c 'command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && cd .. && uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/build-daily-lessons.py || echo "[lessons:build] skipped (uv/python3 unavailable, using existing dailyLessons.json)"'
scripts.lessons:validate: bash -c 'command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && cd .. && python3 scripts/validate-daily-lessons.py || echo "[lessons:validate] skipped (python3 unavailable)"'
scripts.prebuild: npm run lessons:build && npm run lessons:validate
